# HajCare AI

> Your complete digital companion for a peaceful & organized Hajj and Umrah journey. Smart guidance, AI assistance, multilingual content in 11 languages, and spiritual support for pilgrims from India.

HajCare AI offers ritual guidance, official Hajj circulars, building & tent locators, medical facility directories, Saudi rules briefings, multilingual duas, and AI-powered Q&A — built specifically for Indian Hajj pilgrims.

## Guides

- [Hajj Preparation](/prepare): Step-by-step preparation for the Hajj journey.
- [Umrah Guide](/umrah): Complete Umrah rituals walkthrough.
- [Makkah Guide](/makkah-guide): Navigation, mosques, and logistics in Makkah.
- [Madinah Guide](/madinah-guide): Visits, hotels, and key sites in Madinah.
- [Pre-Hajj India](/pre-hajj-india): Indian government formalities before departure.
- [Post-Hajj Guide](/post-hajj): After-Hajj rituals and return-home checklist.
- [Saudi Rules Briefing](/rules): Important rules and conduct in Saudi Arabia.
- [Women Solutions](/women): Guidance tailored for women pilgrims.
- [Duas & Supplications](/dua): Daily and ritual duas.
- [Preparation Guide](/preparation): Packing, vaccinations, and readiness.
- [Health Guide](/health): Health tips for the journey.
- [Food Guide](/food): Halal food and dietary guidance.
- [Money Guide](/money): Currency, cards, and budgeting.
- [Telecom Guide](/telecom): SIM cards, roaming, and connectivity.

## Tools

- [Hajj FAQ Chat](/hajj-faq): AI-powered Q&A on Hajj topics.
- [Hajj Query Wizard](/hajj-wizard): Guided wizard for common pilgrim questions.
- [Tawaf Counter](/tawaf-counter): Ritual counter with haptic feedback.
- [Hajj Buildings Directory](/hajj-buildings): Building lookup in Makkah and Madinah.
- [Medical Facilities](/medical-facilities): Saudi hospital directory.
- [Madinah Hotels](/madinah-hotels): Approved Madinah hotel locator.
- [Mina Tent Locations](/mina-tents): Maktab-wise tent maps.
- [Map](/map): Official maps of Mina, Arafat, Muzdalifah, and Haram.
- [Mashair Map](/mashair-map): Interactive Mashair area map.
- [Lost & Found](/lost-and-found): Report and search lost items.
- [Return to Camp](/return-to-camp): Lost-mode camp finder.
- [Qurbani Booking](/qurbani): Qurbani service booking and tracking.
- [Free Umrah Application](/free-umrah): Apply for sponsored Umrah.
- [Volunteer Registration](/volunteer): Register as a Hajj volunteer.

## Information

- [Contact Numbers](/contacts): Emergency and helpline numbers.
- [Haj Mission Directory](/haj-directory): Indian Haj Mission offices.
- [Haj Inspectors](/haj-inspectors): Inspector directory.
- [Government Services](/govt-services): Indian govt services for pilgrims.
- [Official Circulars](/circulars): AI-summarized Hajj circulars.
